title: ItemShops
description: Trade based complete chest shop system!
body:
**Create immersive chest-based trading systems with ease!**
ItemShops is a powerful, highly customizable plugin that lets players set up in-game item shops using chests. No need for a virtual currency plugin — just trade items directly!

- **🛠️ Shop Creation & Trading System**
Set up chest shops where players can trade items for other items in specific quantities. It's all configurable via intuitive in-game menus!

- **⚙️ Customization & Control**
Fully tailor your shops to match your server’s economy style. ItemShops makes it simple.

> **🔑 Permissions & Commands**
1. /**itemshop create** | itemshops.create | Start creating a new item shop
2. /**itemshop remove** | itemshops.remove | Remove an existing item shop
3. /**itemshop settings** |	itemshops.settings | Customize global settings
5. /**itemshop shops** | Everyone | Manage all your shops
6. /**itemshop stats** | Everyone | See all your shop stats
7. /**itemshop leaderboard** | Everyone | See a leaderboard of selling players
8. /**itemshop admin** | itemshops.admin | Manage and oversee all shops
9. /**itemshop help** |	Everyone | Show help and usage info

_OP players have full access._


**🧠 Good to Know**

- No economy plugin is required — everything works with physical items
- You can fully configure shop behavior to fit survival, factions, or even minigame servers
- Shops are persistent and designed to be lightweight and lag-free

**🛠️ Full Upgrade Sytem**

Upgrade your shops with ease up to 3 levels. Unlock remote settings and restocking. (Can deactivate this system in the config).

![Upgrade your shop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5da4d4d135a610efa7419dfef63f37c99039f6b.png)

**📸 Example Shop**

![Shop Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/M896vxne/images/f45f074254694ca201ce6d25305ae00cc9eded60.png)


Perfect for Survival Servers, Community Markets, or Custom Game Modes!
ItemShops brings trading to life — without the headache of setting up virtual economies.
